allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\roman\\Documents\\Soeren\\mindora-react-flow2-main\\src" -Recurse | Select-Object FullName, PSIsContainer | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName -replace [regex]::Escape\("C:\\Users\\roman\\Documents\\Soeren\\mindora-react-flow2-main\\"\), "" } | Sort-Object)

PowerShell(node --check src/components/courseOverview/levelLayout.js; node --check src/components/courseOverview/Edges/Edges.jsx 2>&1; Write-Output "---"; npx --no-install esbuild --bundle src/components/courseOverview/CourseOverviewFlowCanvas.jsx --outfile=NUL --loader:.jsx=jsx --jsx=automatic --external:react --external:react-dom --external:@xyflow/react --log-level=warning 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path package.json\) { \(Get-Content package.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\).scripts.PSObject.Properties | Select-Object Name, Value | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String -Width 200 })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/mindora-react-flow2/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Length: $\($r.RawContentLength\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in '.png','.jpg','.jpeg','.gif','.webp' } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "---"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Depth 1 | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in '.png','.jpg','.jpeg','.gif','.webp' -and $_.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddDays\(-2\) } | Select-Object FullName, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)
